source_excerpt: Over the last 12 months, the all items index increased 4.2 percent before seasonal adjustment.
notes: The figure (4.2%) and caveat ('before seasonal adjustment') match the source text, but the resolved source is the May 2026 CPI Summary, not a January 2026 report. The claim attributes the 12-month period as ending January 2026, which contradicts the resolved filing period (May 2026), constituting a wrong attribution/period mismatch.
